user.title: Connect Dreame lawn mower

reauth.title: Reconnect account
reauth.description: Update your Dreamehome or MOVAhome credentials.

error.2fa_required: Two-factor authentication must be completed in the vendor app or website before setup can continue.
error.no_devices: No supported lawn mower devices were found for this account.
